ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Aster DM Healthcare Limited has undergone a major strategic overhaul, driven by a scheme of amalgamation, leading to a significantly reconstituted Board of Directors and an extensive reorganization of Senior Management Personnel. Key changes include the appointment of Mr. Varun Khanna as the new Managing Director & Group CEO, with founding family members Dr. Azad Moopen and Ms. Alisha Moopen transitioning to Non-Key Managerial Personnel roles, signaling a professionalization of operational leadership. This comprehensive restructuring, including committee re-composition and a positive amendment to the ESOP scheme by removing re-pricing provisions, is a planned consequence of the merger and does not indicate any immediate red flags.
